TV panel on 'The Indian budget 2014', MA TV Sky 729

community_activities: Advisor to the Oxford Sikh community for over 15 years in the campaign to secure a permanent place of Sikh worship in Oxford.
As convenor of the Oxford South Asia Forum, organised discussions on South Asian issues in Oxford.
Worked with Asylum Welcome, Campaign to Close Campsfield Detention Centre, and the Medical Foundation for the Victims of Torture.
Member of Oxfordshire Standing Advisory Council for Religious Education (2007–present).
Member, International Ethics Review and Advisory Panel for Ensaaf's Punjab Documentation Project (2009–13).
Chair, Panel of Judges to select eminent Punjabis to be honoured by the House of Commons' All Party Parliamentary Committee (2005–08).

public_lectures.title: Invited public lecture on Religion and State in South Asia
Invited public lecture on the importance of environment in Sikh religious teachings
Spoke on the life and achievements of late President Mandela
Keynote address on 'The impact of international remittances on the reduction of poverty'
Lead speaker at the launch of the Punjab Development Initiative
Keynote speaker at a discussion on River Water Disputes in India
